positive: A stylized, abstract portrait of a mythical forest animal, like a majestic stag or a wise fox, blending elements of bioluminescent flora and geometric patterns. The design should feature a clean, striking silhouette against a muted, complementary background, allowing for easy print placement. Incorporate vibrant, glowing jewel tones (teal, emerald, sapphire) that contrast with deep forest greens and charcoal grays. Use a modern, stylized art deco influence mixed with ethereal digital painting, creating depth through careful luminescence and crisp linework. Central composition, optimized for apparel printing, with strong visual contrast and clean edges. Vectorized quality, flat graphic design aesthetic, highly detailed, elegant, mystical, symmetry, full body view.
